name: Buttermilk Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy, adding 1/2 cup of sugar at a time.
3. Blend in vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time.
5. Combine flour and salt; add gradually.
6. Incorporate buttermilk.
7. Sprinkle pecans evenly in the bottom of the pie crust.
8. Pour the custard mixture over the pecans.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes at 300°F. The top will brown as it cooks.
10. Best served at room temperature.
